---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report unclear, incorrect, incomplete, or outdated public documentation
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Page or File

Example:

- `README.md`
- `VERIFY.md`
- `LICENSE.md`
- GitHub Release notes
- HDEX Systems website page

## Problem

Describe what is unclear, incorrect, incomplete, or outdated.

## Suggested Improvement

Explain the correction or improvement.

## Impact

Select the main impact:

- [ ] Setup confusion
- [ ] Verification confusion
- [ ] Release information mismatch
- [ ] License clarity
- [ ] Security guidance clarity
- [ ] Typo or grammar issue
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Other

## Safety Confirmation

- [ ] This issue does not include private keys, passwords, tokens, secrets, confidential files, or regulated data.
